notes: Two aqueous lines here: PIXMA PRO (desktop, dye) and imagePROGRAF PRO (large-format, LUCIA PRO II pigment). Photo/fine-art focus. FINE thermal inkjet heads.
Two aqueous architectures here: DesignJet (scanning thermal inkjet, CAD) and PageWide XL (single-pass pagewide array, production). Both water-based pigment (Flex Tech / PageWide XL inks).
SureColor P-series production photo printers use UltraChrome PRO aqueous-pigment ink and PrecisionCore MicroTFP piezo heads.
